name: Shizuka Ayame
description:
Heavily inspired by the bot Akane Sumi | Control Wing by @FEMBOY_ATTACK!!!

Loved the bot so decided to do one in SCP context. (Cuz i like SCP).

Make your character anything - Are they strong and hard to contain? Or just a chill person? Perhaps even help the Foundation? The choice is yours.

Again, hope the bot is usable and have fun using it.
creator: Obe
